pageContext.name: Boba Fett™
pageContext.description: Do you know who I am? I am Boba Fett.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Boba Fett™ Fine Art Print by artist Jesse Hernandez, also known as Urban Aztec. This Sideshow Convention Exclusive collectible artwork has been created in honor of Star Wars™ Celebration for fans hunting rare bounties.  Inspired by Urban Aztec's own Boba Fett Designer Collectible Bust from Unruly Industries™, the Boba Fett Fine Art Print blends two warrior cultures — the Maya and the Mandalorian™ — into one fearsome fighter. Geometric lines and intricate designs update his signature green, red, and yellow armor into a stoic silhouette that still sends shivers through the galaxy.  This Star Wars art print is available as an unframed, full bleed giclée as well as in a custom poster style framed format. Each Boba Fett Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 500 pieces. Don't miss your chance to bring home this incredibly unique Star Wars wall art for your collection, only available through Sideshow.  Ready to collect on that bounty? Bring home the Boba Fett Fine Art Print by Jesse Hernandez today.
